zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Berenger於1489年出生在英國維爾爾曼寧福德 布魯斯時，她的父親William Berenger II26歲，母親Elizabeth Fettiplace27歲。她於1510年與Sir John Goddard在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1534年在英國維爾爾阿爾德布恩享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾阿爾德布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Berenger于1489年出生在英国維爾爾曼寧福德 布魯斯时，她的父亲William Berenger II26岁，母亲Elizabeth Fettiplace27岁。她于1510年与Sir John Goddard在英国維爾爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1534年在英国維爾爾阿爾德布恩享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾阿爾德布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Berenger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Berringer  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Beringer
meanings: German; French (Béringer): from the ancient Germanic personal name Beringari, Beringer, composed of the elements bern ‘bear’ + ger ‘spear’. Compare French Belanger and Berenger .
German: habitational name for someone from any of several paces called Behringen or Böhringen in Baden-Württemberg and Bayern. Compare   Baringer  ,   Behringer  ,   Berringer  , and   Boehringer  .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Berringer  .

variants.name: Berenguer
meanings: Spanish and French (southern; Bérenguer): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements ber ‘bear’ + ger ‘spear’, a cognate of French Bérenger (see Berenger ) and Béringer (see Beringer ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Berenger was born in 1489, in Manningford Bruce, Wiltshire, England, her father, William Berenger II, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Fettiplace, was 27. She married Sir John Goddard in 1510, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 8 daughters. She died in 1534, in Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Berenger est née en 1489, à Manningford Bruce, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, William Berenger II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Fettiplace, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Goddard en 1510, à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1534, à Aldbourne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Aldbourne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Manningford Bruce, Berkshire, England: Manningford Bruce, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Berenger 1489 in Manningford Bruce, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Berenger II 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Fettiplace 27. Sie hat 1510 in Wiltshire, England Sir John Goddard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1534 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Sir John Goddard nel 1510, nel Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1534, nel Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Aldbourne, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Berengerが1489年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアマニングフォード ブルスで生まれた時，父William Berenger IIは26歳，母Elizabeth Fettiplaceは27歳であった。1510年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアでSir John Goddardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1534年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアアルドボウルンで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアアルドボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Berenger(이)가 1489년 영국 윌츠히르 먼잉퍼드 브루스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Berenger II(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Fettiplace(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 윌츠히르에서 Sir John Goddard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1534년 영국 윌츠히르 알드보우른에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 알드보우른에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Goddard em 1510, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 8 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Berenger родилась в 1489 г. в местности маннингфорд брус, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Berenger II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Fettiplace, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Goddard в 1510 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1534 г. в местности алдбурн, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности алдбурн, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió en 1534, en Aldbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Aldbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
